hero_subtitle: Conferences · Award Nights · Gala Dinners · Workshops · Product Launches
intro_para1: Adelaide Pavilion provides an exceptional backdrop for corporate events of all sizes and types. Our two elegantly appointed function rooms, professional AV infrastructure, and outstanding catering combine to create events that impress clients, reward teams, and leave a lasting impression.  TEST
intro_para2: From intimate boardroom meetings to large-scale gala dinners and conferences for 250+ delegates, our experienced team handles every detail with the professionalism your organisation deserves.
